text: Artificial intelligence is changing many parts of our lives, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. If an AI system learns from data that contains human prejudices, it can make unfair decisions, for example in hiring or lending. Fairness means we must check AI systems carefully to avoid this. Privacy is another key issue; AI often needs large amounts of personal data, so we need to protect people's information. Transparency is also crucial – users should understand how and why an AI makes a specific decision. Overall, responsible AI development requires balancing innovation with these ethical principles, so that technology benefits everyone equally.
